name: nexus-tracker
description: Nexus Tracker - Desktop Accountability App with Cloud Database

scripts.build:client: npm run build --prefix client && powershell -Command "if (Test-Path 'server/public') { Remove-Item -LiteralPath 'server/public' -Recurse -Force }; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path 'server/public' -Force | Out-Null; Copy-Item -Path 'client/dist/*' -Destination 'server/public/' -Recurse -Force"
